---
title: "S&P NetAdvantage"
page-layout: article
---

# S&P NetAdvantage

**Provider:** S&P

## Description

Business research platform with company profiles, financials, industry surveys, stock reports, and screening tools. Supports company, industry, and investment research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Survey & Polling Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Survey & Polling Data

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=http://na.capitaliq.com/ip/yale)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
